title: 2-meter-tall beings in tight green clothes landed on a football field in Belo Horizonte-MG [1967]
excerpt: On September 24th, 1967, in Belo Horizonte-MG, 2-meter-tall beings with tight green clothes, similar to that of divers, emerged from a mushroom-shaped object, landed on a soccer field, leading the young Fábio Diniz to despair. Fábio said that the men had two wide round eyes, with thick triangular eyebrows. Their clothes and nostrils were protected […]
text_preview: On September 24th, 1967, in Belo Horizonte-MG, 2-meter-tall beings with tight green clothes, similar to that of divers, emerged from a mushroom-shaped object, landed on a soccer field, leading the young Fábio Diniz to despair. Fábio said that the men had two wide round eyes, with thick triangular eyebrows. Their clothes and nostrils were protected by a dark and protruding screen. Covering the base of this bulkhead was a tube that ran down the chest to the right heel, then up the back of the neck. On the head, an antenna and an unknown weapon in his hand. The disk was about 20 meters in diamete
summary: 2-meter-tall beings in green diving suits emerged from a mushroom-shaped disc on a soccer field in Belo Horizonte; ground depression and carbonized material found.
